title: Environmental Filtering Pipeline — Parameters
description: Nextflow schema for the environmental filtering analysis pipeline (NRI/NTI, NST, QPE).

input_output_options.title: Input / Output Options
input_output_options.description: Define input files and output destinations.

feature_table.description: Path to the feature table. Accepted formats: BIOM (.biom), TSV, or GTDB TSV.
feature_table.help_text: When input_format is 'biom' this must be a BIOM file. For 'tsv' or 'gtdb' this must be a tab-separated file with feature IDs as row names and sample IDs as column headers (or vice-versa — orientation is auto-detected).

meta_table.description: Path to sample metadata CSV. First column must contain sample IDs that match those in the feature table.
meta_table.help_text: Rows are samples, columns are metadata variables. The first column is used as row names.

taxonomy_table.description: Path to a two-column TSV: col 1 = feature ID, col 2 = semicolon-separated taxonomy string.
taxonomy_table.help_text: Required when input_format is 'tsv' or 'gtdb'. Ignored when input_format is 'biom' (taxonomy is embedded). Supports SILVA (D_0__, D_1__, …) and GTDB (d__, p__, …) prefixes.

tree_file.description: Path to a phylogenetic tree in Newick format. Required by ENV_FILTERING and QPE processes.
tree_file.help_text: Tree tip labels must match OTU/ASV IDs in the feature table. Quotes around tip labels are stripped automatically.

input_format.description: Format of the input feature table.
input_format.help_text: biom: phyloseq import_biom(); tsv: tab-separated with SILVA-style taxonomy; gtdb: tab-separated with GTDB-style taxonomy prefixes.

output_dir.description: Root directory for output CSVs. Sub-folders EF/, NST/, and QPE/ are created automatically.

scripts_dir.description: Path to the root of the ecology-scripts repository inside the container.
scripts_dir.help_text: The R scripts are resolved relative to this path as scripts_dir/src/R/.

label.description: Label appended to all output filenames. Must be a valid filename component.

filtering_options.title: Filtering Options
filtering_options.description: Control sample and feature filtering applied before analysis.

min_library_size.description: Minimum total read count per sample. Samples below this threshold are dropped.
min_library_size.help_text: Set lower for low-depth datasets (e.g. 1000) or higher for strict quality control.

exclude_column.description: Metadata column used to exclude samples. Pairs with exclude_values.
exclude_column.help_text: Leave empty to skip sample exclusion.

exclude_values.description: Comma-separated values in exclude_column that identify samples to remove.
exclude_values.help_text: Example: 'control,blank'. Only applied when exclude_column is also set.

grouping_options.title: Grouping Options
grouping_options.description: Define how samples are grouped for statistical comparisons and output annotation.

groups_column.description: Metadata column used as the primary grouping variable (Groups).
groups_column.help_text: Mutually exclusive with groups_paste_columns. If neither is specified, all samples are assigned to a single group 'All'.

groups_paste_columns.description: Comma-separated metadata columns pasted together (space-joined) to form the Groups variable.
groups_paste_columns.help_text: Example: 'Site,Treatment' creates groups like 'SiteA Treatment1'. Takes precedence over groups_column when both are provided.

type_column.description: Metadata column for sample Type. Included in EF output CSVs.

type2_column.description: Metadata column for a secondary Type2 grouping. Included in EF output CSVs.

type2_levels.description: Comma-separated ordered factor levels for the Type2 variable.
type2_levels.help_text: When provided, Type2 is treated as an ordered factor. Example: 'low,medium,high'.

nri_nti_options.title: NRI / NTI Options (Environmental Filtering)
nri_nti_options.description: Parameters for NRI and NTI calculation via picante ses.mpd / ses.mntd.

ef_runs.description: Number of null model randomizations for SES-MPD and SES-MNTD.

ef_iterations.description: Number of iterations for the trialswap null model.
ef_iterations.help_text: Only used when ef_null_model is 'trialswap' or 'independentswap'.

ef_top_n_otus.description: Number of most abundant OTUs to retain before NRI/NTI calculation.
ef_top_n_otus.help_text: If fewer OTUs are available after filtering, all remaining OTUs are used.

ef_abundance_weighted.help_text: When true (default), NRI/NTI are abundance-weighted. When false, presence/absence-based.

ef_test_method.description: Statistical test for pairwise group comparisons of NRI/NTI values.

ef_p_adjust_method.description: Multiple-testing correction applied to pairwise p-values.

nst_options.title: NST Options
nst_options.description: Parameters for null stochasticity test via the NST package.

nst_randomizations.description: Number of null model randomizations for tNST.

nst_distance.description: Dissimilarity measure passed to tNST as dist.method.
nst_distance.help_text: cao: Cao index (recommended for sparse data); bray: Bray-Curtis; jaccard: Jaccard; chao: Chao dissimilarity.

nst_null_model.description: Null model code passed to tNST. First letter = abundance constraint, second = occurrence constraint (E=equal, P=proportional, F=fixed).

nst_abundance_weighted.description: Use abundance-weighted (Ruzicka) instead of incidence-based (Jaccard) for NST.

nst_ses.description: Calculate the standardized effect size (SES) in tNST.

nst_rc.description: Calculate the modified Raup-Crick metric in tNST.

qpe_options.title: QPE Options
qpe_options.description: Parameters for quantitative process estimation (betaNTI, Raup-Crick, EMS).

qpe_beta_reps.description: Number of randomizations for betaNTI taxon shuffles and Raup-Crick null distributions.
qpe_beta_reps.help_text: Higher values give more stable estimates but increase runtime substantially. 999 is standard for publication.

qpe_ems_sims.description: Number of null model simulations for metacom EMS (Coherence/Turnover/Boundary).
qpe_ems_sims.help_text: Higher values improve p-value precision for EMS tests. 999 is standard; reduce for quick exploratory runs.

qpe_ordering.description: Comma-separated group names defining display order in QPE_summary outputs.
qpe_ordering.help_text: Leave empty for alphabetical ordering. Example: 'Control,Treatment1,Treatment2'.

output_options.title: Output Options
output_options.description: Additional output formats produced after all analyses complete.

merge_parquet.description: Merge all output CSVs into a single Parquet file with analysis and table metadata columns.
merge_parquet.help_text: Writes environmental_filtering_{label}.parquet to output_dir. All CSVs are stacked with NA-fill for differing schemas; filter by the 'analysis' and 'table' columns to extract any coherent slice.
